According to the Indian system there are nine planets i.e. the
seven planets whose names are attached to the week days, and
Rahu and Ketu. Their English names are-—Sun0, Moon),
Mars J . Mercury Jupiter '2J., Venus $, Saturn b, Dragon's
Head or Ascending Node ft, and Dragon's Tail or Descending
Node 7L The zodiac which is a circle has twelve Rasis or Signs
which the planets traverse during theirjourney. These Rasis are
called (i) Mesa— Aries T, (ii) Vrsabha—Taurus y , (iii) Mithuna
—Gemini n, (iv) Karkataka—Cancer db, (v) Simha—I coiL>
